history:orders_payment_attributes_paymen.sql: SELECT o.checkout_surface, pa.authentication_mode, sum(CASE WHEN p.payment_status = {{string}} THEN p.amount ELSE {{number}} END) AS tpv, sum(CASE WHEN p.payment_status = {{string}} THEN {{number}} ELSE {{number}} END) AS successful_payments, count(*) AS total_payments, sum(CASE WHEN p.payment_status = {{string}} THEN {{number}} ELSE {{number}} END)::DOUBLE / nullif(count(*), {{number}}) AS psr FROM payments p JOIN orders o ON p.order_ref = o.order_ref JOIN user_attributes ua ON p.user_ref = ua.user_ref JOIN users u ON p.user_ref = u.user_ref JOIN payment_attributes pa ON p.rail_ref = pa.rail_ref WHERE p.payment_time >= {{timestamp}} AND p.payment_time < {{timestamp}} AND ua.risk_band = {{string}} AND ua.state = {{string}} AND ua.kyc_status = {{string}} AND u.account_state = {{string}} GROUP BY o.checkout_surface, pa.authentication_mode HAVING count(*) >= {{number}} ORDER BY tpv DESC
history:orders_payment_attributes_paymen.template: orders + payment_attributes + payments + user_attributes + users pattern using orders.checkout_surface, orders.order_ref, payment_attributes.authentication_mode, payment_attributes.rail_ref

history:orders_payment_attributes_paymen.sql: SELECT o.checkout_surface, pa.rail_type, sum(CASE WHEN p.payment_status = {{string}} THEN p.amount ELSE {{number}} END) AS tpv FROM orders o JOIN payments p ON o.order_ref = p.order_ref JOIN payment_attributes pa ON p.rail_ref = pa.rail_ref WHERE o.checkout_surface = {{string}} GROUP BY o.checkout_surface, pa.rail_type
history:orders_payment_attributes_paymen.template: orders + payment_attributes + payments pattern using orders.checkout_surface, orders.order_ref, payment_attributes.rail_ref, payment_attributes.rail_type

history:orders_payments:order_ref_order_.sql: SELECT o.product_area, count(DISTINCT o.order_ref) AS orders_created, count(DISTINCT p.payment_ref) AS payment_attempts, count(DISTINCT CASE WHEN p.payment_status = {{string}} THEN p.payment_ref END) AS successful_payments FROM orders o LEFT JOIN payments p ON o.order_ref = p.order_ref WHERE o.product_area = {{string}} AND o.order_time >= {{timestamp}} AND o.order_time < {{timestamp}} GROUP BY o.product_area
history:orders_payments:order_ref_order_.template: orders + payments pattern using orders.order_ref, orders.order_time, orders.product_area, payments.order_ref

history:payment_attributes_payments:rail.sql: SELECT pa.rail_type, sum(CASE WHEN p.payment_status = {{string}} THEN {{number}} ELSE {{number}} END)::DOUBLE / count(*) AS psr, count(*) AS attempts FROM payments p JOIN payment_attributes pa ON p.rail_ref = pa.rail_ref WHERE pa.rail_type = {{string}} AND p.payment_time >= {{timestamp}} AND p.payment_time < {{timestamp}} GROUP BY pa.rail_type
history:payment_attributes_payments:rail.template: payment_attributes + payments pattern using payment_attributes.rail_ref, payment_attributes.rail_type, payments.payment_status, payments.payment_time

history:payment_attributes_payments:rail.sql: SELECT date_trunc({{string}}, p.payment_time) AS month, pa.rail_type, sum(p.amount) AS tpv FROM payments p JOIN payment_attributes pa ON p.rail_ref = pa.rail_ref WHERE p.payment_status = {{string}} AND p.payment_time >= {{timestamp}} AND p.payment_time < {{timestamp}} GROUP BY month, pa.rail_type ORDER BY month, pa.rail_type
history:payment_attributes_payments:rail.template: payment_attributes + payments pattern using payment_attributes.rail_ref, payment_attributes.rail_type, payments.amount, payments.payment_status

history:payment_attributes_payments_user.sql: SELECT pa.rail_type, ua.risk_band, sum(CASE WHEN p.payment_status = {{string}} THEN p.amount ELSE {{number}} END) AS successful_volume, count(*) AS attempts FROM payments p JOIN payment_attributes pa ON p.rail_ref = pa.rail_ref JOIN user_attributes ua ON p.user_ref = ua.user_ref WHERE pa.rail_type = {{string}} AND ua.risk_band = {{string}} GROUP BY pa.rail_type, ua.risk_band
history:payment_attributes_payments_user.template: payment_attributes + payments + user_attributes pattern using payment_attributes.rail_ref, payment_attributes.rail_type, payments.amount, payments.payment_status

history:payments_user_attributes:payment.sql: WITH prior_users AS ( SELECT DISTINCT p.user_ref FROM payments p WHERE p.payment_status = {{string}} AND p.payment_time < {{timestamp}} - INTERVAL {{number}} DAY ), recent_users AS ( SELECT DISTINCT p.user_ref FROM payments p WHERE p.payment_status = {{string}} AND p.payment_time >= {{timestamp}} - INTERVAL {{number}} DAY ) SELECT ua.risk_band, count(*) AS churned_users FROM prior_users pu JOIN user_attributes ua ON pu.user_ref = ua.user_ref LEFT JOIN recent_users ru ON pu.user_ref = ru.user_ref WHERE ru.user_ref IS NULL AND ua.risk_band = {{string}} GROUP BY ua.risk_band
history:payments_user_attributes:payment.template: payments + user_attributes pattern using payments.payment_status, payments.payment_time, payments.user_ref, user_attributes.risk_band

history:payments_user_attributes_users:a.sql: SELECT u.platform_plan, ua.gender, count(DISTINCT p.user_ref) AS active_users, sum(CASE WHEN p.payment_status = {{string}} THEN p.amount ELSE {{number}} END) AS tpv FROM users u JOIN user_attributes ua ON u.user_ref = ua.user_ref JOIN payments p ON u.user_ref = p.user_ref WHERE ua.gender = {{string}} GROUP BY u.platform_plan, ua.gender ORDER BY tpv DESC
history:payments_user_attributes_users:a.template: payments + user_attributes + users pattern using payments.amount, payments.payment_status, payments.user_ref, user_attributes.gender

history:payments_user_attributes_users:p.sql: SELECT ua.state, count(DISTINCT p.user_ref) AS active_users FROM payments p JOIN users u ON p.user_ref = u.user_ref JOIN user_attributes ua ON u.user_ref = ua.user_ref WHERE p.payment_status = {{string}} AND ua.state = {{string}} AND p.payment_time >= {{timestamp}} AND p.payment_time < {{timestamp}} GROUP BY ua.state
history:payments_user_attributes_users:p.template: payments + user_attributes + users pattern using payments.payment_status, payments.payment_time, payments.user_ref, user_attributes.state

history:payments_user_attributes_users:p.sql: SELECT ua.kyc_status, sum(CASE WHEN p.payment_status = {{string}} THEN {{number}} ELSE {{number}} END)::DOUBLE / count(*) AS psr FROM payments p JOIN users u ON p.user_ref = u.user_ref JOIN user_attributes ua ON u.user_ref = ua.user_ref WHERE ua.state = {{string}} GROUP BY ua.kyc_status ORDER BY ua.kyc_status
history:payments_user_attributes_users:p.template: payments + user_attributes + users pattern using payments.payment_status, payments.user_ref, user_attributes.kyc_status, user_attributes.state

history:payments_users:payment_status_pa.sql: WITH txns AS ( SELECT p.user_ref, date_trunc({{string}}, p.payment_time) AS month, count(*) AS successful_txns FROM payments p JOIN users u ON p.user_ref = u.user_ref WHERE p.payment_status = {{string}} AND p.payment_time >= {{timestamp}} AND p.payment_time < {{timestamp}} GROUP BY p.user_ref, month ) SELECT count(*) AS retained_users FROM ( SELECT user_ref FROM txns GROUP BY user_ref HAVING sum(successful_txns) >= {{number}} AND count(DISTINCT month) = {{number}} ) retained
history:payments_users:payment_status_pa.template: payments + users pattern using payments.payment_status, payments.payment_time, payments.user_ref, users.user_ref

self_play:orders.order_amount.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS row_count, COUNT(order_amount) AS non_null_count, MIN(order_amount) AS min_value, AVG(order_amount) AS avg_value, MAX(order_amount) AS max_value, SUM(order_amount) AS total_value FROM read_parquet('/Users/bharath/Documents/DiracData/v2/data/fintech_schema/parquet/orders.parquet')

self_play:payment_attributes.route_partn.sql: SELECT route_partner, COUNT(*) AS row_count FROM read_parquet('/Users/bharath/Documents/DiracData/v2/data/fintech_schema/parquet/payment_attributes.parquet') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY row_count DESC LIMIT 20

self_play:payment_attributes.settlement_.sql: SELECT settlement_speed, COUNT(*) AS row_count FROM read_parquet('/Users/bharath/Documents/DiracData/v2/data/fintech_schema/parquet/payment_attributes.parquet') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY row_count DESC LIMIT 20

self_play:user_attributes.city.sql: SELECT city, COUNT(*) AS row_count FROM read_parquet('/Users/bharath/Documents/DiracData/v2/data/fintech_schema/parquet/user_attributes.parquet') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY row_count DESC LIMIT 20

self_play:users.acquisition_channel.sql: SELECT acquisition_channel, COUNT(*) AS row_count FROM read_parquet('/Users/bharath/Documents/DiracData/v2/data/fintech_schema/parquet/users.parquet') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY row_count DESC LIMIT 20

self_play:users.country.sql: SELECT country, COUNT(*) AS row_count FROM read_parquet('/Users/bharath/Documents/DiracData/v2/data/fintech_schema/parquet/users.parquet') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY row_count DESC LIMIT 20
